feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue in UNIT_CONVERSION in CDS View Entity
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to perform unit conversion in CDS view entities in version 75I. So, trying to use unit_conversion, however it ends with SQL code 719.
My CDS view:

Error with execution:

Database returned the SQL code 719. Error text: currency/unit conversion error: search table error: Conversion( "COL$11$" ),
row 0: could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s) 7 from unit 'ST' to unit 'KAR' for client '010'

Both these unit are part of T006 table.

Could you please provide valuable inputs to solve the same.

Regards,

JR

entry.title: How to clear parameter after clicking selective radio button in selection-screen?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Devs,

I was doing my best for coding practice, but I got stuck on one problem, which I was unable to find anywhere. Here's the problem:- The code I was writing in AT SELECTION-SCREEN for screen-input for two parameters, where I executed my code, then I added values to the parameters, and here I am confused. There are two parameters (radius & diameter) and two radio buttons with having same name. When I try to click the radius radio button, the diameter parameter value doesn't clear and vice versa. Below are my code and snapshots.

PLEASE HELP!!! 

Requirement: When I click the radio button, only that parameter value should be taken further, and the other parameter must be cleared.

entry.title: Re: How to clear parameter after clicking selective radio...
entry.content:
Hi @JayeshHati1997,

You're on the right path! Getting stuck is part of the process, and it's great that you're practicing and doing your best to solve things on your own. Keep at it!

Regarding your code:

You're using AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT with a LOOP AT SCREEN, trying to clear fields based on radiobutton selection. However, this doesn't work as expected because:

  1. AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT is executed before the screen is displayed and there are other events that are more suitable for this handling.

  2.  screen-name CS 'pradius' only checks the name of the screen field, not whether the user selected a radiobutton. To check if a radiobutton is selected, you should use a direct check like:

IF p_rad EQ 'X'.
  " Your logic here
ENDIF.

  That means p_rad is selected. If it’s initial, it means it's not selected. The same applies to p_dia.

Recommended fix:

    Use the USER-COMMAND rb that you added to the radio button group and handle the logic in the AT SELECTION-SCREEN event. This way, the code runs after the user interacts with the radiobuttons in the GRB1 group:

AT SELECTION-SCREEN.
  IF sy-ucomm EQ 'RB'.
    " Your logic here.
  ENDIF.

You can also use:

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON RADIOBUTTON GROUP grb1.

 

With the event AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON RADIOBUTTON GROUP grb1 you don't need the USER-COMMAND rb defined in the PARAMETER and can handle it from the identifier of the radibutton group.

For further reference and more examples, these SAP documentation links might help:
  • Selection Screens – Block and Radio Button Processing ( Good code examples for your request );
  • AT SELECTION-SCREEN statement.

Hope this helps. Keep experimenting!
Any questions, just let me know.

Regards,
Hugo Loiola.

entry.title: Get technical information from Service Definition using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

Does anyone know if there is any class or function module I could use to read the technical information of a service definition? For example, I want to get the entities exposed from the service definition along with their alias and then also read the fields of these entities with their alias. If there is no such class or function module, does anyone know on which tables I can find these information?

Thank you!

entry.title: BAPI to remove ship-to from business partner
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is that any BAPI or FM to remove ship-to from the business partner?

Recently we have done upgrade S4 HANA. Earlier we use BDC to remove ship-to from the sold-to via XD02 t.code and works well. Now after upgrade we can't do via BDC. So, is that any BAPI or FM to achieve the case?

Thanks,

Dhina.

entry.title: bapi_po_create1 : passing standard table field J_1BNBM into bapi
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I have a field J_1BNBM in EKPO table which is getting field with control code.
There is validaion in po creation ME21N using method IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM to make the field as mandatory due to which I am getting the
same error while using the BAPI_PO_CREATE1.
However, there is no field available  in line item of BAPI_PO_CREATE1 of related to J_1BNBM or control code.
The bapi will only post the PO if I could able to pass control_code(J_1BNBM)  using the same BAPI.
I thought of using as well as tried to achieve it through extension . But extension is for only customer add on fields .

J_1BNBM is standard field in EKPO and not customer field.

How to resolve this issue as I am at crossroads now ?

entry.title: How to Update standart fields of me31k?
entry.content:
Hi, experts, if there is an enhancement for changing ekpo/ekko fields in me31k?

i found badi's 

ME_CHECK_OA

ME_PROCESS_REQ

BAdI definition is only provided for SAP internal use

and exit's like 
EXIT_SAPMM06E_016
EXIT_SAPMM06E_017
EXIT_SAPMM06E_018
But it's only for changing and importing z-fields, as i undestood
What i should do to change standart field, like EKPO-SPINF(InfoUpdate)?

entry.title: How to run ATC checks only on code delta of a changed object?
entry.content:
We are currently using the on-premise 2021 version of our S/4 HANA system. We would like to understand the procedure for running ATC (ABAP Test Cockpit) checks specifically on delta code changes, rather than executing checks on the entire object each time.
 
Could you please provide us with information or documentation on how to configure and execute ATC checks to focus only on the modifications made to the code?

entry.title: ISU_DB_QMEL_UPDATE Update QMEL table
entry.content:
Hello Folks !

I’m working on a requirement where I need to create and update entries in the QMEL table using data from Excel. I tried using the function module ISU_DB_QMEL_UPDATE for the update operation.

However, during testing: When I use update mode (X_UPD_MODE = 'U'), it always returns SY-SUBRC = 4 and says the record does not exist.

When I switch to insert mode (X_UPD_MODE = 'I'), it throws an error saying the record already exists.

If there's a recommended BAPI for creating or updating QMEL entries (including Z-fields), I’d appreciate your suggestions. Thanks !

entry.title: how to add and populate two custom fields in additional tab at header level for PO
entry.content:
I have a requirement to add and populate two custom fields in the additional tab at header level for Purchase Order. Please help to identify the best way to achieve this. Thanks in advance.

@DominikTylczyn @Sandra_Rossi @SAPSupport

entry.title: Shared Object Memory for ABAP for Cloud Development?
entry.content:
There are great posts available showing how to utilize shared memory objects & SAP transaction 'SHMA' that can be used in Standard ABAP.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/shared-memory-objects-transfer-data-between-abap-programs/ba-p/13451524

While refactoring for ABAP for Cloud Development, I came accross the error "The use of Interface IF_SHM_BUILD_INSTANCE" is not permitted. Is there any equivalent to Shared Object Memory Areas that is compatible with ABAP for Cloud Development ABAP syntax?

ABAP Cloud Development usage Error

Yoloyoda's abap cloud cheatsheet does give an example of using the DATA BUFFER, however, this does not seem to be on par with the control we used to have SHMA.


__PRESENT

entry.title: CALL TRANSFORMATION - Existence check condition on XML elements
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a situation where I want to parse an XML file using a simple XSLT. I use conditions on tags in case an element is not present in the source XML.

The problem is that it seems in some elements the conditional check works and in other it fails. 

If I omit the conditional check and just read the value of the element - if present - it reads it ok.

I attach an extract of the XSLT source code to let you understand and, possibly, help me overcome this issue. Also, I attach part of the XML under deserialization.

Thanks a lot,

Konstantinos

 

NB I found the solution, by mistake I was using the wrong ST command. Since I am doing de-serialization, I had to use the command shown in the last attachment.

entry.title: Related For loop Iteration
entry.content:
Hello All I have table which contain suppose 10 record and in the table there is field in which i want to maintain value like  1 to 10 like counter.

        IT_FINAL_TRC = VALUE #( FOR WA_SYT0060_TRC IN IT_SYT0060_TRD_TRR_TRC (
                                    Sr_no                          = WA_SYT0060_TRC-SRNO
                                    Transport_request              = WA_SYT0060_TRC-TRPRN
                                    Transport_Request_description  = WA_SYT0060_TRC-TRPRD
                                    Customized_Work_bench          = WA_SYT0060_TRC-CUSWB
        ) ).

PLease suggest the solution 

@Sandra_Rossi 

@SAPSupport 

@RaymondGiuseppi

entry.title: How to enhance standart screen of migo?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Is it possible to enhance a standart screen at migo ('Serial Numbers tab')?
Could i add some buttons inside red rectangle as example?

entry.title: How to create a report that shows count of GL open items?
entry.content:
I am looking for a way to create a report with ABAP or SQVI, that shows the count of GL open items on GL level.

I don't want to see the lines items and do a manual count outside of SAP. I would need to have this report to run for multiple company codes and the number of transactions are not something to be taken to other applications like excel.

My aim is to have a report with the following fields:

Company CodeGL AccountCountValue

 

Is there a possibility to do this? If so what are the steps I should take to create this as I am not an IT person I would need more details if possible :).

 

Thank you

entry.title: why sql trace shows different execution time?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Why sql trace shows different values 
At st12 at trace analus Gross duration is 467 seconds,when i click to DB-> it show that sql take only 197.
How to understand what were 270 seconds spent on?

entry.title: CALL TRANSFORMATION - CX_ST_COND_CHECK_FAIL exception
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am using a simple ST transformation to de-serialize an input XML to obtain a deep structure. I use conditional transformation for some elements which I know they are not obligatory. 

Specifically, there is an optional element that I check for existence but even if the conditional transformation is successful, the value of the input element is not read and CALL TRANSFORMATION statement raises an CX_ST_COND_CHECK_FAIL exception.

The XML extract is highlighted below

The underlying datatype is XSDBOOLEAN

and the ST source code extract is:

In debug mode, after execution the variable value is empty although present in the input XML as shown above: 

and the exception is raised:

What is wrong in this case?

Regards,

Konstantinos

entry.title: Why mod operator doesn't work?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Why mine mod operatior cause 'Relational operator "MOD" is not supported.'

data : lv_val type i VALUE 2.
if lv_val MOD 2  = 0.
  MESSAGE 'Yes' type 'E'.
endif.

entry.title: ADT class rename error "Change in transport assignment is not supported"
entry.content:
Via ADT, I'm trying to rename a class:

After typing a shorter new name ZCL_BAPI and clicked "Finish" immediately (or after the list of objects using the class), I get this error:

Rename Classe

A fatal error occurred while performing the refactoring.

Change in transport assignment is not supported

All concerned objects are locked to the transport request. The tasks were all released but not the order. I expect that the concerned objects are added to a new task.

What is the problem? How to solve?

Thanks.

Sandra

NB: usually, I have no problem when renaming.

System: ABAP 7.58, On premises, Eclipse 2025-03, ADT 3.48

entry.title: ABAP_trial 2022 HDB start problems: ARM64
entry.content:
Hello

I'm trying to run the ABAP 2022 trial, (https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial), on a windows ARM64 machine using WSL2. Anyone manage this successfully? 

I get the following error in nameserver_vhcala4hci.30201.000.trc:

[1980]{-1}[-1/-1] 2025-05-30 14:42:07.142187 i FileIO FileStatistics.cpp(00520) : FileFactoryConfiguration::initial(path="/hana/log/HDB/mnt00001/hdb00001/"[LOG], async_write_submit_active=on,async_write_submit_blocks=all,async_read_submit=on,num_submit_queues=1,num_completion_queues=1,size_kernel_io_queue=512,max_parallel_io_requests=64,min_submit_batch_size=16,max_submit_batch_size=64)
[1980]{-1}[-1/-1] 2025-05-30 14:42:07.144227 i FileIO FileStatistics.cpp(01392) : SubmitQueueConfiguration::initial(path="/hana/log/HDB/mnt00001/hdb00001/"[LOG], num_submit_queues=1,size_kernel_io_queue=512,max_parallel_io_requests=64,min_submit_batch_size=16,max_submit_batch_size=64)
[1980]{-1}[-1/-1] 2025-05-30 14:42:07.146082 e FileIO LocalFileCompletionThread.cpp(00523) : NOTE: One reason for failed io_setup might be that kernel parameter aio_max_nr is too low.
[1980]{-1}[-1/-1] 2025-05-30 14:42:07.149912 f PersistenceLayer PersistenceController.cpp(00787) : startup failed exception 1: no.2000009 (Basis/IO/FileAccess/impl/LocalFileCompletionThread.cpp:524) TID: 1980
Error calling io_setup, rc=38: Function not implemented
exception throw location:
0: 0x00002aaada94e35c in FileAccess::LocalFileCompletionThreadHandler::initCompletionPort(unsigned short) [clone .constprop.0]+0x1a8 at Basis/IO/FileAccess/impl/LocalFileCompletionThread.cpp:524 (libhdbbasis.so)
1: 0x00002aaada5c845c in FileAccess::LocalFileCompletionThreadHandler::createThread(Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, ltt::basic_string<char, ltt::char_traits<char>, 39ul> const&, FileAccess::PathWrapper const&, FileAccess::FileFactory::Usage const&, unsigned int, unsigned short)+0x28 at Basis/IO/FileAccess/impl/LocalFileCompletionThread.cpp:499 (libhdbbasis.so)
2: 0x00002aaada5c9303 in FileAccess::LocalFileFactory::init(Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&)+0x6f0 at Basis/IO/FileAccess/spi/IoThread.hpp:214 (libhdbbasis.so)

HDB does not start:

HDB: starting

30.05.2025 14:41:44
Start
OK

30.05.2025 14:42:18
StartWait
FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running
HDB: the start command failed, exit code=2
The service HDB has failed to start and initialization is blocked until the problem is resolved
You can try your luck 10 times until initialization is terminated
Hint: docker containers can be joined by: docker exec -it <name> bash
Hint: Container must have at least 16GB RAM available
Hint: Container must have at least 70GB DISK free
Hit Return to continue

 

Memory
:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB02/vhcala4hci/trace # free -h
total used free shared buff/cache available
Mem: 27Gi 1.3Gi 25Gi 100Mi 454Mi 26Gi
Swap: 170Gi 0B 170Gi
Disk
:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB02/vhcala4hci/trace # df -h
Filesystem Size Used Avail Use% Mounted on
overlay    1007G 76G 881G 8% /
tmpfs        64M 0    64M 0% /dev
tmpfs        14G 0    14G 0% /sys/fs/cgroup
shm          64M 0    64M 0% /dev/shm
/dev/sdd   1007G 76G 881G 8% /etc/hosts
tmpfs        14G 0    14G 0% /proc/acpi
tmpfs        14G 0    14G 0% /sys/firmware

WSL
wsl -v
WSL version: 2.4.13.0
Kernel version: 5.15.167.4-1
WSLg version: 1.0.65
MSRDC version: 1.2.5716
Direct3D version: 1.611.1-81528511
DXCore version: 10.0.26100.1-240331-1435.ge-release
Windows version: 10.0.26100.4061

 

Any insights much appreciated.

Thanks,
Helios.
